Vou refatorar o `index.html` para incluir um efeito Matrix no background. Primeiro, vou analisar o arquivo atual e depois criar a versão com o efeito Matrix.

operations.replace:
<style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            min-height: 100vh;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            background: #000;
        }

        /* Matrix Rain Background */
        .matrix-bg {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: -1;
            overflow: hidden;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .matrix-bg canvas {
            display: block;
        }

        /* Overlay for better text readability */
        .overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
            backdrop-filter: blur(3px);
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .content {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            padding: 2rem;
            color: #00ff41;
            text-align: center;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 4rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px #00ff41, 0 0 20px #00ff41;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
            animation: text-fade 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
        }

        p {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            opacity: 0.9;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
        }

        @keyframes text-fade {
            from {
                opacity: 0.8;
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
            }
        }

        /* CRT scanline effect */
        .crt-lines {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: repeating-linear-gradient(
                0deg,
                rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15),
                rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px,
                transparent 1px,
                transparent 2px
            );
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 10;
        }

        /* Vignette effect */
        .vignette {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: radial-gradient(
                circle, 
                transparent 50%,
                rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) 100%
            );
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 11;
        }
operations.search:
<style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            min-height: 100vh;
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Dynamic gradient background */
        .gradient-bg {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(
                45deg,
                #1a1a2e,
                #16213e,
                #0f3460,
                #533483,
                #6c5ce7,
                #a29bfe,
                #fd79a8,
                #fdcb6e,
                #e17055,
                #00b894,
                #0984e3,
                #6c5ce7
            );
            background-size: 400% 400%;
            animation: gradient-shift 15s ease infinite;
            z-index: -1;
        }

        @keyframes gradient-shift {
            0% {
                background-position: 0% 50%;
            }
            50% {
                background-position: 100% 50%;
            }
            100% {
                background-position: 0% 50%;
            }
        }

        /* Overlay for better text readability */
        .overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
            z-index: 0;
        }

        .content {
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            padding: 2rem;
            color: white;
            text-align: center;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 4rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
            animation: text-fade 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
        }

        p {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            opacity: 0.9;
        }

        @keyframes text-fade {
            from {
                opacity: 0.8;
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
            }
        }
